name: Swiss Asparagus Au Gratin
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Kraft Touch of Butter (Spread, melted)
recipeInstructions:
Serves: 4
Heat oven to 400 degrees. Bring 1/2 cup water to a boil in a 10-inch skillet; add asparagus. Cook for 2 minutes; drain. (Asparagus will still be crisp). Place in a 10 x 6 inch baking dish. Mix remaining ingredients, sprinkle over asparagus. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until cheese mixture is lightly browned.
